name: promote
description: End-to-end product promotion strategy. 2 entry points exposed (promote-strategist + promote-content-batcher) backed by 37 internal expert prompts under prompts/ (operators, frameworks, personas) invoked via Read+Task tool — zero system-prompt pollution. Give the strategist a URL: it asks about the product, proposes channels actively (beyond what you mentioned), invokes operators in strategic-consultation mode, produces 14 days of concrete content + 76 days of outlines. Use content-batcher to convert outlines to concrete posts on demand.

promote_home.title: Campaigns directory
promote_home.description: Where promote artifacts (campaigns) are written. Resolution order: 1) $PROMOTE_HOME env var, 2) ./campaigns/ relative to cwd (default), 3) ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/campaigns/ fallback if cwd is not writable.
